results.title: Don Jr. marries Palm Beach socialite; president couldn't make it
results.description: Donald Trump Jr., the president’s eldest son, married Bettina Anderson, a Palm Beach socialite and influencer, on Thursday in West Palm Beach, Fla., according to Palm Beach County marriage records.The marriage certificate listed Brad McPherson, a real estate attorney who...
results.source: Santa Fe New Mexican Homepage | Santa Fe New Mexic
